text:
SHORT NAME: FRMLRY_RX_ID 
LONG NAME: FRMLRY_RX_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
PDE and CMS HPMS (derived) 
VALUES: 
8-digit number 
The value: 99999999 indicates diabetic supplies. 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2010. 
The formulary characteristics files are built from the CMS approved formulary data found in the CMS’ 
Health Plan Management System (HPMS) where a proxy NDC is assigned to each RXCUI. The proxy 
NDC for each drug product is mapped to a unique FirstDataBank brand name
